message.content: @startuml actor Client participant "Service A" as ServiceA #D3DAE7 participant "Service B" as ServiceB #D3DAE7 Client ->> ServiceA : GET /service-a/concept/1\nactivate ServiceA deactivate ServiceA return 301 Redirect: /service-b/concept\n//(redirect) //to//\nservice-b/concept/1 \nas redirectResponse note over redirectResponse This response indicates that the resource has moved permanently to service-b. The client should update any bookmarks or links accordingly. end note Client ->> ServiceB : GET /service-b/concept/1\nactivate ServiceB deactivate ServiceB return 200 OK: <object>\nas objectReturn @enduml
